message:
fix(upgrade): display Reason field in close match diagnostics

The assetInfo.Reason field was being populated with helpful diagnostic
messages (e.g., "same OS, specific arch (got amd64, want universal)")
but was only visible in JSON output, not in the human-readable error.

Now close matches display the actual reason instead of the generic
"closest match" text, providing better diagnostic information:

Before: ≈ ntm_1.4.1_darwin_amd64.tar.gz ← closest match
After:  ≈ ntm_1.4.1_darwin_amd64.tar.gz ← same OS, specific arch (got amd64, want universal)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
